name: Marshmallow Bars
recipeIngredient: Oat cereal; cornflake or whole wheat flake cereal
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Crocker's Cookbook
Butter a 9 x 9 x 2-inch square pan. Heat marshmallows and margarine in a 3-quart saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly, until marshmallows are melted and the mixture is smooth; remove from heat. Stir in vanilla extract. Stir in half of the cereal at a time until evenly coated. Press into the prepared pan. Cool completely.
Cut into about 2 x 1-inch bars. Makes approximately 36 bars with about 35 calories per bar.
To Microwave: Cut margarine into 4 pieces. Place in a microwavable bowl or casserole dish. Microwave uncovered on high for 1 minute 30 seconds to 2 minutes 30 seconds, stirring every minute until the marshmallows are smooth and melted. Continue as directed.
